svg.title: Synalux POS — ai ordering
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for ai ordering. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Hi! I'm your Synalux AI assistant.
What can I get you today? I can help you
choose items, filter by diet, or take your order.
Great choice! Here are 3 vegetarian options
under $15 that are light and popular today:
Romaine · parmesan · homemade croutons · Caesar dressing
Arborio rice · wild mushrooms · parmesan · truffle oil
I'll take the Caesar Salad please
✓ Added Caesar Salad to your order!
Would you like to add a drink to go with that?
Lemonade pairs really well with the Caesar.
Confirm via AI · Or continue ordering
Prism Coder (on-device) · Fuzzy menu matching via pos_menu_items · Allergen flags from pos_allergens · Upsell rules from pos_ai_upsell_config · Phone orders via Twilio → KDS routing
Synalux POS — AI Ordering Assistant · Prism Coder Local LLM · 1366×1024
